name: Cat Poop Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2/3 Cup Butter or margarine, or lard
Ginger, cinnamon, and cloves to taste (maybe 1/2 tsp each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients: whole wheat flour, cocoa powder, and Grape-nuts.
2. In a separate bowl, mix wet ingredients: honey, butter or margarine, vanilla extract (or peppermint), molasses, egg, and any desired spices.
3. Combine the wet and dry ingredients to form a dough.
4. Chill the dough for 1 hour in the freezer or several hours in the refrigerator.
5. Roll out the chilled dough into logs of various lengths and diameters suitable for cat poop.
6. Roll each log in Grape-nuts cereal.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until the cookies are done, which may take about 10 to 15 minutes. Note that baking times can vary with different ovens.
8. Serve on a bed of Grape-nuts and use a cat litter scoop for serving.
This recipe is designed to replicate the texture and appearance of cat poop cookies while using ingredients commonly associated with cat-related themes.
